title: Greeting
description: Write a Vera function that builds a greeting string. Given a name, return 'Hello, <name>!'. Use string_concat to build the result. The precondition should require the name is non-empty. The postcondition should guarantee the result is longer than 7 characters.
notes: String contracts fall to Tier 3 (runtime). Tests string_concat discovery. test_cases is intentionally empty: vera run --fn returns an internal representation for String return types (not the string content), so runtime output comparison is not possible for string-returning functions.
